# Appendix B: Complete Key Map

| Key | Normal | 2nd | ALPHA |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `F1` | F1 ‚Äî Choose the first visible soft-menu item | M1 ‚Äî Open memory menu slot one | ‚Äî |
| `F2` | F2 ‚Äî Choose the second visible soft-menu item | M2 ‚Äî Open memory menu slot two | ‚Äî |
| `F3` | F3 ‚Äî Choose the third visible soft-menu item | M3 ‚Äî Open memory menu slot three | ‚Äî |
| `F4` | F4 ‚Äî Choose the fourth visible soft-menu item | M4 ‚Äî Open memory menu slot four | ‚Äî |
| `F5` | F5 ‚Äî Choose the fifth visible soft-menu item | M5 ‚Äî Open memory menu slot five | ‚Äî |
| `2ND` | 2nd ‚Äî Arm one shifted action | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `EXIT` | EXIT ‚Äî Return one navigation level | QUIT ‚Äî Return to the home calculator | ‚Äî |
| `MORE` | MORE ‚Äî Advance to the next menu page | MODE ‚Äî Open calculator mode settings | ‚Äî |
| `UP` | ‚ñ≤ ‚Äî Move selection or cursor up | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `DOWN` | ‚ñº ‚Äî Move selection or cursor down | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `ALPHA` | ALPHA ‚Äî Arm or lock alphabetic entry | alpha ‚Äî Select lowercase alphabetic entry | ‚Äî |
| `X-VAR` | x-VAR ‚Äî Insert the active graph variable | LINK ‚Äî Open local link diagnostics | x ‚Äî Insert x |
| `DEL` | DEL ‚Äî Delete at the editor cursor | INS ‚Äî Toggle insert and overwrite mode | ‚Äî |
| `LEFT` | ‚óÄ ‚Äî Move selection or cursor left | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `RIGHT` | ‚ñ∂ ‚Äî Move selection or cursor right | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `GRAPH` | GRAPH ‚Äî Open the graph application | SOLVER ‚Äî Open the general equation solver | ‚Äî |
| `STAT` | STAT ‚Äî Open the statistics application | SIMULT ‚Äî Open the simultaneous-equation solver | ‚Äî |
| `PRGM` | PRGM ‚Äî Open the program manager | POLY ‚Äî Open the polynomial solver | ‚Äî |
| `CUSTOM` | CUSTOM ‚Äî Open the user custom menu | CATALOG ‚Äî Open the callable-feature catalog | ‚Äî |
| `CLEAR` | CLEAR ‚Äî Clear the entry or dismiss an error | TOLER ‚Äî Open numerical tolerance settings | ‚Äî |
| `LOG` | LOG ‚Äî Insert base-ten logarithm | 10^x ‚Äî Insert ten raised to a power | A ‚Äî Insert A |
| `SIN` | SIN ‚Äî Insert sine | SIN^-1 ‚Äî Insert inverse sine | B ‚Äî Insert B |
| `COS` | COS ‚Äî Insert cosine | COS^-1 ‚Äî Insert inverse cosine | C ‚Äî Insert C |
| `TAN` | TAN ‚Äî Insert tangent | TAN^-1 ‚Äî Insert inverse tangent | D ‚Äî Insert D |
| `^` | ^ ‚Äî Insert the power operator | œÄ ‚Äî Insert pi | E ‚Äî Insert E |
| `LN` | LN ‚Äî Insert natural logarithm | e^x ‚Äî Insert natural exponential | F ‚Äî Insert F |
| `EE` | EE ‚Äî Insert a scientific-notation exponent | x^-1 ‚Äî Insert reciprocal | G ‚Äî Insert G |
| `(` | ( ‚Äî Insert an opening parenthesis | [ ‚Äî Insert an opening collection bracket | H ‚Äî Insert H |
| `)` | ) ‚Äî Insert a closing parenthesis | ] ‚Äî Insert a closing collection bracket | I ‚Äî Insert I |
| `/` | √∑ ‚Äî Insert division | CALC ‚Äî Open numerical calculus tools | J ‚Äî Insert J |
| `X^2` | x¬≤ ‚Äî Square the current value | ‚àö ‚Äî Insert square root | K ‚Äî Insert K |
| `7` | 7 ‚Äî Insert digit seven | MATRX ‚Äî Open matrix tools | L ‚Äî Insert L |
| `8` | 8 ‚Äî Insert digit eight | VECTR ‚Äî Open vector tools | M ‚Äî Insert M |
| `9` | 9 ‚Äî Insert digit nine | CPLX ‚Äî Open complex-number tools | N ‚Äî Insert N |
| `*` | √ó ‚Äî Insert multiplication | MATH ‚Äî Open the general mathematics menu | O ‚Äî Insert O |
| `,` | , ‚Äî Insert an argument separator | ‚àÝ ‚Äî Insert the polar-angle operator | P ‚Äî Insert P |
| `4` | 4 ‚Äî Insert digit four | CONS ‚Äî Open built-in and user constants | Q ‚Äî Insert Q |
| `5` | 5 ‚Äî Insert digit five | CONV ‚Äî Open unit conversions | R ‚Äî Insert R |
| `6` | 6 ‚Äî Insert digit six | STRNG ‚Äî Open string operations | S ‚Äî Insert S |
| `-` | - ‚Äî Insert subtraction | LIST ‚Äî Open list tools | T ‚Äî Insert T |
| `STO` | STO‚ñ∂ ‚Äî Store a value in a named variable | RCL ‚Äî Recall a named variable | ‚Äî |
| `1` | 1 ‚Äî Insert digit one | BASE ‚Äî Open number-base tools | U ‚Äî Insert U |
| `2` | 2 ‚Äî Insert digit two | TEST ‚Äî Open comparison and logical tests | V ‚Äî Insert V |
| `3` | 3 ‚Äî Insert digit three | VARS ‚Äî Open the variable browser | W ‚Äî Insert W |
| `+` | + ‚Äî Insert addition | MEM ‚Äî Open memory management | X ‚Äî Insert X |
| `ON` | ON ‚Äî Wake the calculator or interrupt an operation | OFF ‚Äî Shut down the calculator | ‚Äî |
| `0` | 0 ‚Äî Insert digit zero | CHAR ‚Äî Open the character palette | Y ‚Äî Insert Y |
| `.` | . ‚Äî Insert a decimal point | : ‚Äî Insert a program statement separator | Z ‚Äî Insert Z |
| `(-)` | (-) ‚Äî Insert unary minus | ANS ‚Äî Insert the previous answer | ‚Äî |
| `ENTER` | ENTER ‚Äî Confirm or evaluate | ENTRY ‚Äî Recall the previous entry | ‚Äî |
